name: Rust
postCreateCommand: rustc --version && cargo --version && cargo install --locked kani-verifier && sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/cargo/bin && sudo ln -sf "$(which rustup)" /usr/local/cargo/bin/rustup-init && cargo kani setup && sudo apt-get install clang lld python3-pip -y && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && pip install plotly --break-system-packages
